title: hieracium carpathicum subsp. rutiliceps
intro: Hieracium carpathicum subsp. rutiliceps is a subspecies of the Hieracium carpathicum plant, a type of hawkweed that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium carpathicum subsp. rutiliceps include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
